blockers.description: Dimension coverage (0%) is below threshold (80%). 0 gap(s) found. STOP is blocked until all required dimensions have meaningful coverage.

findingDetails.title: Delta validation does not enforce canonical-record parity
findingDetails.evidence: Only numeric iteration identity is compared; delta v2 content is not independently validated before reducer consumption.
findingDetails.recommendation: Enforce canonical field parity or independently validate the delta iteration record.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact validator/test search found only route-proof and iteration-id checks; deep-review reducer loads delta payloads.

claimAdjudication.claim: A contradictory delta canonical record can pass gates and reach reducer input.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched validators and tests for canonical field equality or independent delta validation.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Per-event rows are independent, but the canonical iteration row is contractually shared.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A mandatory downstream pre-reducer parity gate is demonstrated.

findingDetails.title: Narrative verdict gate accepts a non-final or duplicated verdict
findingDetails.evidence: The unanchored regex accepts any verdict occurrence despite the absolute-final-line and uniqueness contract.
findingDetails.recommendation: Require one exact case-sensitive verdict as the trimmed final line.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact search found the owning contract and sole runtime verifier, with no final-line or uniqueness test.

claimAdjudication.claim: The mechanical gate accepts narratives violating the mandatory verdict contract.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched validators, workflow caller, and tests for final-line or uniqueness enforcement.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Verdict may be re-derived downstream, but malformed artifact acceptance still violates this gate.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A mandatory earlier gate rejecting non-final or duplicate verdicts is demonstrated.

noveltyJustification: First correctness iteration established two previously unregistered gate defects.
edgeCases: bounded correctness slice; target not saturated
code graph not used; exact search and direct reads used

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Shared runtime gates and reducers affect all deep-review iterations across a 1,217-file target.

targetSelection.selectionReason: Shared correctness boundaries for the three-artifact contract and new divergent mode.

searchLedger.hypothesis: State and delta canonical records can diverge while validation passes.

searchActions.result: Only route proof and numeric iteration identity are compared.
Reducer loads records from every per-iteration delta file.

searchLedger.rationale: Canonical record contradiction is not rejected before structured consumption.

searchLedger.invariant: Exactly one verdict must be the absolute final narrative line.

searchActions.queryOrPath: absolute final line contract and workflow caller
searchActions.result: Owning skill mandates final-line uniqueness and auto workflow invokes verifier.

searchLedger.rationale: Malformed narrative can pass the mechanical reliability gate.

searchLedger.invariant: Pivot completion requires three fulfilled parse-valid seats, material agreement, and no high blocker.

searchActions.queryOrPath: quorum and agreement implementation plus tests
searchActions.result: All invariants are enforced and covered by fail-closed tests.

searchLedger.rationale: Direct source and integration tests agree.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Three-seat quorum and blocker veto are explicit.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Interrupted pivots duplicate durable completion or redispatch completed seats.

searchActions.queryOrPath: event deduplication, resume, and interruption test
searchActions.result: Semantic event-id replay checks and missing-seat filtering prevent duplicate durable seats and outcomes.

searchLedger.rationale: Durable replay is idempotent for tested interruption boundaries.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Event IDs and persisted seat discovery gate redispatch.

blockers.description: Dimension coverage (0%) is below threshold (80%). 3 gap(s) found. STOP is blocked until all required dimensions have meaningful coverage.

findingDetails.title: Dispatch receipts cannot authenticate across the workflow process boundary
findingDetails.evidence: The random module-scoped signing secret exists only in the standalone dispatch process; fresh-process verification of the live iteration-1 receipt returned false.
findingDetails.recommendation: Share verification authority through a trusted process boundary and add a cross-process end-to-end test.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Workflow wiring, tests, and live receipt replay show no key handoff across processes.

claimAdjudication.claim: An authentic dispatch receipt produced by the auto workflow cannot be verified by a fresh post-dispatch validator process.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Inspected workflow wiring and receipt tests and replayed the live receipt from a fresh process; no key handoff exists.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: Validation could share the producer process, but the YAML dispatch command exits first.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Production proves one module instance spans dispatch and validation or identifies protected key handoff.

findingDetails.title: The advertised permissions gate is not connected to executor dispatch
findingDetails.evidence: Only definitions and tests call the gate; active OpenCode dispatch bypasses permissions and has no trusted workspace mutation reconciliation.
findingDetails.recommendation: Wire enforcement to dispatch/tool execution and add before/after allowed-write verification.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact repository search found no production evaluator caller or post-dispatch mutation gate.

claimAdjudication.claim: Deep-review executor dispatch has no runtime-enforced packet write boundary despite cataloguing a shipped pre-dispatch permissions gate.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched all .opencode code and YAML for evaluator calls and runtime workspace mutation checks; only definitions and tests were found.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: An external orchestrator may eventually call the library, but the active workflow does not and the catalog says shipped.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: A production caller is shown to intercept every executor tool call or a trusted mutation gate rejects out-of-packet writes.

results.summary: Receipt authority and write-boundary claims were checked against active workflow wiring.
F009 is catalogued as shipped, but no production dispatch caller exists.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Security review spans shared executor, validation, workflow, and state-safety boundaries.

targetSelection.selectionReason: These files produce executor commands, authenticate dispatch, and claim write-boundary enforcement.

searchLedger.invariant: A receipt produced by executor dispatch must verify at the later post-dispatch gate.

searchActions.result: Producer secret is module-local and dispatch command exits before validation.

searchActions.queryOrPath: iteration-1 intent receipt in fresh tsx process

searchLedger.rationale: Cross-process verification fails for an authentic live receipt.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Prompt-only write boundaries permit out-of-packet mutation.

searchActions.result: Only definitions and unit tests found.
Branch passes --dangerously-skip-permissions and documents prompt-only containment.

searchLedger.rationale: The advertised gate is disconnected from the active executor boundary.

searchLedger.invariant: Untrusted prompt/model values must not be shell-interpreted.

searchActions.result: Commands use argv arrays without shell:true; prompt remains one argument.

searchLedger.rationale: No shell interpolation exists at the reviewed dispatch boundary.

searchLedger.invariant: Receipt signing authority must not reach the executor child.

searchActions.result: Secret is module-scoped and non-native child environment is allowlisted.

searchLedger.rationale: No child-visible key path was identified.
searchLedger.ruledOutReason: Source and end-to-end child visibility test agree.

blockers.description: Dimension coverage (0%) is below threshold (80%). 6 gap(s) found. STOP is blocked until all required dimensions have meaningful coverage.

findingDetails.title: Cross-runtime LEAF contracts omit the required delta artifact and contradict append-only state handling
findingDetails.evidence: Both runtime agents omit the required delta from their write boundaries and later direct state-log overwrite, while the active workflow and stress test require narrative, append-only state, and delta artifacts.
findingDetails.recommendation: Align both runtime agents and the playbook with the workflow's append-only narrative/state/delta contract.
findingDetails.scopeProof: Exact search confirmed identical stale instructions in both runtime agents and contradictory artifact identities in the playbook.

claimAdjudication.claim: Canonical LEAF instructions conflict with the active workflow's required artifact and append-only state contract.
claimAdjudication.counterevidenceSought: Searched both runtime agents, owning skill, active workflow, playbook, and stress test for delta authorization and append/overwrite semantics.
claimAdjudication.alternativeExplanation: The agent text may predate LEAF-owned delta generation, but the active dispatch contract currently requires that generation before validation.
claimAdjudication.downgradeTrigger: Reducer-owned delta generation plus proof that the overwrite step is unreachable, or complete contract alignment.

reviewDepthApplicability.reason: Cross-runtime agent, workflow, skill, and playbook contracts govern a 1217-file multi-mode review surface.

targetSelection.selectionReason: These are the producer and consumer contracts for route proof, allowed writes, and iteration artifact validation.
omittedHighRiskTargets: packet checklist acceptance evidence deferred to stabilization traceability pass

searchLedger.invariant: Every canonical LEAF write instruction must authorize all workflow-required artifacts and preserve append-only state.

searchActions.result: Both agents omit delta authorization and direct overwrite while the workflow declares a delta path.

searchLedger.rationale: Producer and consumer contracts materially disagree on required writes.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Runtime copies differ and only one is stale.

searchActions.queryOrPath: OpenCode and Claude deep-review write boundaries
searchActions.result: The copies are aligned with each other but both are stale relative to the workflow.

searchLedger.rationale: Cross-runtime parity duplicates rather than contains the defect.

searchLedger.invariant: The playbook must name one stable three-artifact iteration contract.

searchActions.queryOrPath: exactly three artifacts|post-dispatch validation checks for all three
searchActions.result: The playbook alternately identifies state append and delta append as the third artifact; the stress test expects both.

searchLedger.rationale: The operator-facing evidence contract is self-contradictory.

searchLedger.hypothesis: Packet checklist evidence confirms all shipped deep-review artifact claims.

searchActions.result: Deferred after the bounded cross-runtime execution-contract slice consumed the iteration budget.

searchLedger.rationale: Must be executed in a stabilization traceability pass before legal STOP.
searchLedger.deferredReason: Iteration budget prioritized the newly discovered cross-consumer contract split.

reason: Iteration narrative uses prose-style adjudication fields (Claim:/Evidence:/... bullets), not the required embedded JSON typed-packet block; the JSONL findingDetails.claimAdjudication is well-formed but the schema requires the packet embedded in the iteration markdown file itself, and prose-only adjudication blocks are explicitly no longer accepted.
